thing-type.label: OpenAI Account
thing-type.description: Account at OpenAI that is used for accessing the ChatGPT API.

parameter-group.name: authentication
parameter-group.label: Authentication
parameter-group.description: Authentication for connecting to OpenAI API.

parameter-group.name: connection
parameter-group.label: Connection
parameter-group.description: Connection settings for the OpenAI API.

parameter.name: apiKey
parameter.label: API Key
parameter.description: API key to access the account

parameter.name: baseUrl
parameter.label: API Base URL
parameter.description: The base URL of the OpenAI API service.

parameter.name: requestTimeout
parameter.label: Request Timeout
parameter.description: Timeout in seconds for chat API requests. Used as default for all channels.

parameter.name: model
parameter.label: Model
parameter.description: ID of the model to use.

parameter.name: temperature
parameter.label: Temperature
parameter.description: What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.

parameter.name: topP
parameter.label: TopP
parameter.description: An alternative to sampling with temperature, called nucleus sampling, where the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. So 0.1 means only the tokens comprising the top 10% probability mass are considered. We generally recommend altering this or temperature but not both.

parameter.name: maxTokens
parameter.label: Max Tokens
parameter.description: The maximum number of tokens that can be generated in the chat completion.

parameter.name: maxToolCalls
parameter.label: Maximum Number of Tool Calls
parameter.description: The maximum number of sequential tool calls to execute in a single HLI request.

parameter.name: model
parameter.label: Model
parameter.description: The model to be used for the responses

parameter.name: temperature
parameter.label: Temperature
parameter.description: Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.

parameter.name: systemMessage
parameter.label: System Message
parameter.description: The system message helps set the behavior of the assistant.

parameter.name: maxTokens
parameter.label: Maximum Number of Tokens
parameter.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion.

parameter.name: topP
parameter.label: TopP
parameter.description: An alternative to sampling with temperature, called nucleus sampling, where the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. So 0.1 means only the tokens comprising the top 10% probability mass are considered. We generally recommend altering this or temperature but not both.

parameter.name: requestTimeout
parameter.label: Request Timeout
parameter.description: Timeout in seconds for this channel. Overrides the thing-level timeout.
